creator: topical@gmx.net
text:
When configured as followed:

```
filebeat.inputs:

- type: syslog
  enabled: true
  format: auto
  protocol.tcp:
    host: "0.0.0.0:10514"
  publisher_pipeline.disable_host: true
```

beats doesn't listen to port 10514.

This bug occurs with beats8-8.8.2_2 whereas beats8-8.7.0_2 works fine.
